xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: For detailed notes on financial results, please refer outcome of Board Meeting for Approval of the Unaudited Financial Results of the Bank for the quarter ended and half year ended September 30, 2025, which is available on the stock exchange websites i.e. BSE: https://www.bseindia.com, NSE: https://www.nseindia.com, and on Bank’s website: https://suryoday.bank.in/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnAssetsAndLi: For detailed notes on financial results, please refer outcome of Board Meeting for Approval of the Unaudited Financial Results of the Bank for the quarter ended and half year ended September 30, 2025, which is available on the stock exchange websites i.e. BSE: https://www.bseindia.com, NSE: https://www.nseindia.com, and on Bank’s website: https://suryoday.bank.in/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp: For detailed notes on financial results, please refer outcome of Board Meeting for Approval of the Unaudited Financial Results of the Bank for the quarter ended and half year ended September 30, 2025, which is available on the stock exchange websites i.e. BSE: https://www.bseindia.com, NSE: https://www.nseindia.com, and on Bank’s website: https://suryoday.bank.in/
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherRelatedPartyTran: Deposits with the Bank including the interest earned on such deposits
